name: RCB OE TL.Z./Telekom Aust
summary: Telekom Austria AG, now known as A1 Telekom Austria Group, is Austria's largest telecommunications provider, offering a comprehensive portfolio of fixed-line, mobile, broadband, and multimedia services. Headquartered in Vienna, Austria, the company operates under the A1 brand in Austria and also has subsidiaries in several Central and Eastern European countries. A1 Telekom Austria Group generates revenue through subscriptions, service fees, and the sale of telecommunications equipment.
